headline: Chubb (CB) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Chubb (CB) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: U.S. Pet Insurance Direct Premiums Written Hit Record High In Q1'26
summary: Business is booming for US pet insurers, with direct premiums written in the first quarter hitting an all-time quarterly high for the industry.
